title: SSC CHSL (10+2)
stepsToApply: Visit the official website ssc.gov.in || Complete the One-Time Registration (OTR) process || Log in and fill out the CHSL 2026 application form || Upload your photograph, signature, and required documents || Pay the application fee online if applicable and submit
aiPersonalizedTip: As a female or SC/ST applicant, you are completely exempted from paying the registration fee! This is an excellent opportunity to apply without any financial barrier.
examPattern: Tier 1: 100 objective questions, 200 marks, 60 minutes. 0.50 negative marking.

recommendedBooks.title: A Modern Approach to Verbal & Non-Verbal Reasoning
recommendedBooks.author: R.S. Aggarwal

examBlueprint: Quant: 25 Qs / 50 Mks || Reasoning: 25 Qs / 50 Mks || English: 25 Qs / 50 Mks || GA: 25 Qs / 50 Mks

title: RRB NTPC Station Master
stepsToApply: Go to the official portal indianrailways.gov.in || Select your respective regional RRB portal || Fill out the online application form for Station Master || Upload educational certificates and other required documents || Submit the application and print the confirmation page
aiPersonalizedTip: With a graduate degree, you are fully eligible to apply for this prestigious Station Master role. Female and SC/ST candidates get a fully refundable application fee of ₹250 after appearing in CBT 1.
examPattern: CBT exam covering Math shortcuts, general analytics, and GK. 0.33 negative marking.
examBlueprint: Math & Reasoning: 60 Qs / 60 Mks || General Awareness: 40 Qs / 40 Mks
